title: FormalJets
summary: Represents a finite rho-jet of the tangential metric g_rho and the condition that it solves the FG Ricci equations to finite order.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Represents a finite rho-jet of the tangential metric g_rho and the condition that it solves the FG Ricci equations to finite order.

mathematicalContent.heading: Formal boundary
mathematicalContent.body: This page describes exactly the declarations present in Ambient/FG/FormalJets.lean; claims not represented by a declaration are not counted as verified.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: Sym2 Component. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Definition: Symmetric Component. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Data/interface: Formal Metric Jet. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Definition: coeff At. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def coeffAt (J : FormalMetricJet ι K) (m : ℕ) (hm : m ≤ K) : Sym2Component ι

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: coeff At zero. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem coeffAt_zero (J : FormalMetricJet ι K) : J.coeffAt 0 (Nat.zero_le K) = J.baseMetric

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: first Coeff. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def firstCoeff (J : FormalMetricJet ι K) (hK : 1 ≤ K) : Sym2Component ι

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Data/interface: Satisfies FGRicci To Order. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: structure SatisfiesFGRicciToOrder (J : FormalMetricJet ι K) (order : ℕ) : Prop

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: FG first jet. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem FG_first_jet (J : FormalMetricJet ι K) (H : SatisfiesFGRicciToOrder J 1) (i j : ι) : J.coeffAt 1 H.order_le i j = 2 * J.schouten i j

references.locator: Chapters 2–3, ambient space and normal form
references.note: Geometric source for the ambient bundle, homogeneity, normal form, and commutator calculations.

limitations: The displayed Lean results are checked relative to structures, typeclasses, certificates, or model laws supplied as hypotheses. The module does not by itself derive every interface field from a concrete geometric backend.
